##NAMES=Rockbridgeite
##RRUFFID=R060858
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=(Fe^2+^_0.5_Fe^3+^_0.5_)_2_Fe^3+^_3_(PO_4_)_3_(OH)_5_
##LOCALITY=Tip Top mine, Custer County, South Dakota, USA
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Marcus Origlieri
##DESCRIPTION=Dark reddish brown elongated prismatic crystals associated with jahnsite-(CaMnMg), R060213
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R060858
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=(Fe^2+^_0.62_Mn^2+^_0.33_Mg_0.05_)Fe^3+^_4.00_(P_1.00_O_4_)_3_(OH)_5_ ; OH estimated by difference  Fe2+ and Fe3+ by charge balance
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 13.975 b: 16.814 c: 5.1706 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 90 volume: 1214.9 crystal system: orthorhombic
##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
